quotes.text: Shout out to whoever invented the green room because without that little sanctuary of snacks and whisky I would have told six different talk show hosts to go fuck themselves by now. Six. I've counted.
quotes.speaker: Anthony Bourdain
quotes.context: SXSW Interactive keynote Q&A, Austin, Texas, March 2016
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Bourdain's contempt for certain media formats and his love of whisky were both very public, making this entirely plausible. The giveaway is 'six — I've counted'; Bourdain's wit was sharper and more literary; the punchy counting gag reads slightly more like a stand-up comedian than his typical voice.

quotes.text: My dating advice? Stop texting 'u up' at 1am and start texting 'I made carbonara, come over.' Upgrade your game. Carbs close more deals than cologne, I promise you that.
quotes.speaker: Kevin Hart
quotes.context: Cold as Balls Season 6, Laugh Out Loud Network, taping session, 2021
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Kevin riffing on modern dating with a comedy-bit structure is squarely in his wheelhouse. The giveaway is 'carbonara' specifically; Kevin's food references skew more American comfort food than Italian pasta in his actual stand-up.

quotes.text: The ice cream man always drove an extra block away. I know he's seen us, but I think he just be in the car with his friends saying, 'Watch me how fast I make these motherfuckers run.'
quotes.speaker: Eddie Murphy
quotes.context: From Eddie Murphy's 1983 HBO stand-up special 'Delirious' (filmed at DAR Constitution Hall) — his childhood ice-cream-truck bit, where the vendor cruelly speeds off to watch the neighborhood kids chase him.

quotes.text: Last year I was really into the word cocksucker. I thought it sounded so mean!
quotes.speaker: Danny McBride
quotes.context: Answering a rapid-fire 'favorite curse word' question in a Maxim interview promoting 'Eastbound & Down.'

quotes.text: All the drugs just neutered me. When I was on drugs, I felt like this nunnish, non-sexual person. After I stopped doing drugs I started to fuck like a bunny!
quotes.speaker: Courtney Love
quotes.context: On how getting sober changed her sex drive, in an interview with The Fix.

quotes.text: Three cities in four days, not enough sleep, somebody's Patrón showing up on my rider by mistake — and I still played two encores. That's not talent, that's stubbornness. Pure, dumb, beautiful stubbornness.
quotes.speaker: Bruce Springsteen
quotes.context: Rolling Stone 'Musicians on Musicians' feature recorded at Asbury Park, New Jersey, September 2023
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Bruce's work-ethic mythology combined with a rare wink at tour-life excess makes this feel plausible. The giveaway is 'Patrón on the rider' — Springsteen's public image is conspicuously blue-collar beer-and-bourbon, not premium tequila.
